note: Student-facing welcome letter for new SPOKES participants. Use this when students ask what to expect at orientation, how to get started, which first steps they need to complete, or where initial program onboarding information lives.

Orientation checklist for SPOKES students. Use this when students ask which forms, policies, and onboarding tasks they need to complete during orientation before moving into regular classwork or certification planning.

Student rights and responsibilities form for SPOKES orientation. Use this when students ask where to find program expectations, responsibilities, participant rights, required acknowledgements, or orientation paperwork.

SPOKES dress code policy for students. Use this when students ask what clothing is acceptable, how they should dress for class or program activities, or which orientation form covers appearance expectations.

WV Adult Education technology acceptable use policy for students. Use this when students ask about computer, internet, device, account, or platform rules they must follow while using SPOKES technology.

DoHS release of information form for WV Adult Education and SPOKES students. Use this when students ask why information may be shared, what authorization is needed, or which release form belongs with orientation.

SPOKES student profile form used during orientation. Use this when students ask how to complete their profile, update personal or program information, or identify which onboarding form collects student details.

Employment portfolio checklist for orientation and career readiness. Use this when students ask what documents, evidence, certificates, forms, or work samples should go into their SPOKES employment portfolio.

Student portfolio checklist for organizing employability evidence. Use this when students ask what belongs in their portfolio, how to prepare job-readiness materials, or which documents demonstrate progress.

Support services fact sheet for students. Use this when students ask about help with transportation, childcare, basic needs, program barriers, referrals, or where to learn about available SPOKES support services.
WV Works and TANF time sheet or participation form for students. Use this when students ask which timesheet they need, how SPOKES participation is documented, or which DFA form records program hours.

WV Works sample verification form for student referral or participation documentation. Use this when students ask about TANF, WV Works paperwork, caseworker documentation, or examples of required verification.

WV Works dental services information for students. Use this when students ask about dental support, benefits, service options, or whether WV Works can help with health-related needs that affect attendance.
